configurations.name: Frontend (Vite)
runtimeArgs: cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev

configurations.name: Backend (FastAPI)
runtimeArgs: import subprocess, sys, os; os.chdir('backend'); subprocess.run([sys.executable, '-m', 'pip', 'install', '-r', 'requirements.txt', '-q']); subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'run.py'])
